settings.title: Settings
settings.labourRateError: Enter a rate of 0 or more.
settings.markupError: Enter a markup of 0 or more.
settings.logoUploadFailed: Could not upload that logo — please try a different image.
settings.saveFailed: Could not save your settings — please try again.
settings.font: Font (web page only — PDFs stay Helvetica)
settings.invoicingBody: Controls how new invoices are numbered and what payment details they show.
settings.accountHolderNamePlaceholder: Leave blank to use your business name
settings.invoiceFooterNotePlaceholder: e.g. Please pay within 30 days, quoting the invoice number
settings.recurringDisplayBody: Recurring contracts price from the same line items as one-off jobs above, scaled by the contract terms entered on each quote.
settings.notificationsBody: Get an email as soon as a customer responds to a quote.
settings.notifyOnAccept: Notify me when a quote is accepted
settings.notifyOnDecline: Notify me when a quote is declined
settings.notificationEmailHint: Defaults to your business email — change it to get notifications somewhere else.
settings.termsBody: Appears in small print at the bottom of every quote PDF.
settings.termsPlaceholder: e.g. This quote is valid for 30 days. Payment due within 14 days of invoice. All work guaranteed for 2 years.
settings.mollieLiveHint: Clients are now paying with real money via iDEAL. Want to go back to testing? Replace MOLLIE_API_KEY with a key that starts with "test_".
settings.mollieTestHint: Fake payments only — safe to test freely. When you're ready to accept real payments, replace MOLLIE_API_KEY with a key that starts with "live_" (Mollie Dashboard → Developers → API keys).
settings.mollieSetupHint: Sign up free at mollie.com, copy your API key (Developers → API keys), and paste it as MOLLIE_API_KEY — locally in .env.local, on your live site via Vercel's project settings. Start with a test key (starts with "test_").
settings.remindersBody: Automatically sends a reminder before the due date, on the due date, and when overdue — stops the moment an invoice is paid.
settings.reminderScheduleError: Enter 0 or higher for every reminder timing.
settings.reminderScheduleOrderError: The second reminder must come later than the first.

templateUpload.templateTooLarge: That template is too large — please simplify it.
templateUpload.fileTooLarge: That file is {size} MB — please upload something under {max} MB.
templateUpload.readFailed: Could not read that file — please try again.
templateUpload.previewFailed: Could not render a preview — please try again.
templateUpload.saveFailed: Could not save your template — please try again.
templateUpload.savedTitle: Template saved — your quotes will now use this design.
templateUpload.noLineItemsRegion: No LINE_ITEMS_START / LINE_ITEMS_END region found — your line items won't appear on the quote.
templateUpload.missingTokens: Missing {count, plural, one {token} other {tokens}}: {tokens} — these usually matter on every quote.
templateUpload.unknownTokens: Unrecognized {count, plural, one {token} other {tokens}} (won't be filled in): {tokens} — check the token reference below for the exact names.
templateUpload.looksGood: Looks good — every required token and the line-items region were found.
templateUpload.useThisTemplate: Use this template for my quotes
templateUpload.uploadDescription: Upload a fully-designed HTML file (e.g. from an AI design tool) and every quote will be rendered from it — pixel for pixel, as a real PDF.
templateUpload.replaceNote: Uploading a new file replaces the one you have now, but only once you save it.
templateUpload.howToBuildTemplate: How do I build a template?
templateUpload.guideIntro: Write plain HTML + CSS (inline <style> is fine). Anywhere you want real data, drop in one of these — we replace them before rendering:
templateUpload.guideLineItemsIntro: For the line items table, wrap ONE row in HTML comments — it repeats once per item:
templateUpload.guideOrderBody: put {coverNoteToken} right after the header/addressee block, then the line-items table and totals, then {scopeTextToken} ("Scope of work") after the totals. Any terms, annexes, and signature blocks stay after that, unchanged. Every PDF is generated in this order.
templateUpload.guideParagraphBody:
{coverNoteToken} and {scopeTextToken} are AI-written prose, not one line — each already renders as its own HTML paragraph(s), so place them directly (don't wrap them in your own

tag). They pick up whatever font, size and color the container you put them in already uses — no separate styling needed.
templateUpload.guideLabelTokensBody: Never type fixed chrome text like "Subtotal", "VAT", or "Signature" directly into your template — use an lbl_ token instead. Every quote has its own language (Dutch or English); these tokens are automatically filled in that language, so one template always displays in the right one:
templateUpload.guideRecurringBody: Wrap a block in {recurringStartToken} … {recurringEndToken} and it only shows up on recurring quotes — for a one-off job the whole block (markers included) is removed, so there's never an empty heading. The example template's recurring block is just two lines, per day and per month, styled like the totals block above it:
templateUpload.guideRecurringAdvancedIntro: A few more recurring tokens exist if you want a more detailed breakdown (per week, per year, total over the contract term, the contract's days/week and weeks/year, and each line's own week/year total) — all optional, same rule: every figure comes straight from the pricing engine, nothing is recalculated.
templateUpload.guideRecurringItemNote: These two can also go inside the line-items row (between LINE_ITEMS_START/END) — that one line's own week and year totals, also only filled in on recurring quotes.

meta.title: Stipt — Quotes and invoices, done on the dot.
meta.description: Build a clean, professional quote in thirty seconds. One tap later, the invoice is ready. For tradespeople in the Netherlands.

hero.subtitle: Build a clean, professional quote in thirty seconds — before you've even left the driveway. One tap later, the invoice is ready. The numbers are always right.
hero.micro: No credit card · Dutch & English · Works on your phone

trustStrip.stat1Text: from site visit to sent quote
trustStrip.stat4Text: bilingual, for you and your client

features.title: One tool for all your paperwork
features.lead: From first quote to paid invoice. Built for renovation, installation and cleaning crews — not for an accountant behind a desk.
features.f1Body: Pick the work, tap in the quantities, and the price rolls straight out. Stipt writes the tidy wording for you — you just hit send.
features.f2Body: Gap-free sequential invoice numbers, multiple VAT rates, and books that reconcile. Exactly how the tax office wants it.
features.f3Body: Job done? Turn your accepted quote straight into an invoice. Add any extra work in seconds. Nothing retyped, nothing forgotten.
features.f4Body: Every amount is calculated exactly — deliberately without AI. The AI only helps with the wording, never with the maths.
features.f5Title: Shareable links with QR & read receipts
features.f5Body: Send your quote as a link or QR code. You see the moment the client opens and accepts it. Delivered tidily by email, with the work programme attached. All in Dutch and English.
features.f5Tag: QR · Read receipts · Work programme · Email

how.title: Three steps, done in the driveway
how.lead: No training needed. If you can send a text, you can run Stipt.
how.step1Body: Pick your services and quantities on your phone, right there on site. Stipt works out the price and VAT instantly.
how.step2Body: Share it as a link or QR code. Your client opens, reviews and accepts — and you see it happen.
how.step3Body: Job finished? One tap and the invoice is ready with the right number. Done. Paid. On to the next job.

pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready for more.
pricing.lead: Free to start, with a small ad on your share page. Premium removes the ads and unlocks everything.
pricing.freeDesc: Everything you need to start quoting and invoicing.
pricing.freeFeature5: Small Stipt ad on your share page
pricing.premiumDesc: No ads, your own branding, and the tools that save real time.
pricing.premiumFeature3: Your own logo & colours on quotes and invoices
pricing.note: Prices are a placeholder — adjust them as you like. Cancel monthly. Pay with iDEAL or card.

finalCta.title: Done wrestling with Word and Excel
finalCta.body: Make your first quote today. Free, no card, done before your coffee's cold.

footer.copyright: © {year} Stipt · Quotes and invoices, done on the dot. · Built for tradespeople in the Netherlands.
